name: Australia and New Zealand Banking Group Ltd.
h1: ANZ, ANZ Bank's GCC footprint in India
lede: ANZ, ANZ Bank runs two capability centers in Bengaluru. Bengaluru, covering gcc/gic, built over 37 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one ANZ, ANZ Bank office in India. We map two, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.

about.description: ANZ, ANZ Bank's India footprint covers Bengaluru, spanning gcc/gic. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 27 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does ANZ, ANZ Bank operate in India?
faq.a: ANZ, ANZ Bank operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does ANZ, ANZ Bank have GCC centers in?
faq.a: ANZ, ANZ Bank's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does ANZ, ANZ Bank run in India?
faq.a: ANZ, ANZ Bank runs gcc/gic centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at ANZ, ANZ Bank's India GCCs?
faq.a: ANZ, ANZ Bank's India centers employ in the 5,000 to 10,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads ANZ, ANZ Bank's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 27 leaders at ANZ, ANZ Bank's India centers, across IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
